text:
Hah
Mujh se keh ke ajal hai payaam-e-aish-o-suroor
Nah
Kheench naqsha-e-kaifiyat-e-sharaab-e-tahoor
Firaaq
Hoor mein ho gham se humkinaar na tu
Pari
Ko sheesha-e-alfaaz mein utaar na tu
Mujhe
Fareefta-e-saaqi-e-jameel na kar
Bayaan
Hoor na kar, zikr-e-salsabeel na kar
Maqaam
Aman hai jannat, mujhe kalaam nahin
Shabaab
Ke liye mauzoo'n tera payaam nahin
Shabaab
, aah! kahan tak umeedwaar rahe
Woh
Aish, aish nahin, jis ka intezaar rahe
Woh
Husn kya jo mohtaaj-e-chashm-e-beena ho
Namood
Ke liye minnat pazeer-e-farda ho
Ajeeb
Cheez hai ehsaas-e-zindagaani ka
Aqeeda
'Ishrat-e-Imroz' hai jawaani ka
